name: vc-intelligence-platform
description: AI-assisted VC diligence and startup matching SaaS for Malaysia and Southeast Asia.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.prod:check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm audit --omit=dev
scripts.db:deploy: npm run prisma:deploy -w apps/api && npm run prisma:generate -w apps/api
